drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0(f0 in (-2, 9, 7), $s0_0 : f1); $a0_0 : average($s0_0) )
then
end
rule "R1"
salience($b1_0_0 * 4)
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f1 not in (-1.5, 5.5), $b2_0_0 : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(-2.5, $p2_0.getF0(), "", true));
end
rule "R3"
salience($b3_0_0 - $b3_0_0)
when
    T0($b3_0_0 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($b3_0_0, 12, "b", true));
end
